infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: This app needs Bluetooth access to connect to thermal printers for printing item tags.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothPeripheralUsageDescription: This app needs Bluetooth access to connect to thermal printers for printing item tags.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Take an optional photo of the item at check-in so staff can compare it to the physical item at sale time.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Gear Swap Organizer to take an optional check-in photo of items (compare at sale).
